sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19300" key="bambra/ssei" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαμβράσσει·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀργίζεται,</foreign> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαμβρασμός·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καχλασμός,</foreign> Cyr.Dresd.</entryFree>
